intro: Building or remodeling in Beverly Hills operates on a rigorous standard. The residential market here requires a general contractor who natively understands both the architectural expectations and the city's specific building department intricacies. Whether you are dealing with challenging hillside ordinances, strict HOA design reviews, or coastal commission overlays depending on your exact lot, Red Stag Construction has the experience to bypass the typical learning curve. For homeowners planning a major kitchen remodel, a ground-up ADU, or a completely new custom residence, our design-build model ensures execution without compromise. License #964664. Call (626) 652-2303 to schedule a site visit in Beverly Hills.
